programme.title: Savor the City
programme.desc: Embarking on a travel journey with Chef Jernard Wells that is filled with adventure, cuisine, and experiences. Inspired by the "Green Book," the show follows Chef Jernard as he travels through America and beyond, uncovering the best of Black culture. programme.title: Savor the City
